assignments.name: Set_new_GPC_reference_to_PCE
assignments.label: Set new GPC reference to PCE

Flow.description: US365468 - custom clone process to copy Guest Preference Code with related Preference Eligibility Rules.
Flow.interviewLabel: Clone Guest Preference Code with Eligibility Rules {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Clone Guest Preference Code with Eligibility Rules

screens.name: Clone_Guest_Preference_Code_with_Eligibility_Rules
screens.label: Clone Guest Preference Code with Eligibility Rules

validationRule.errorMessage: The value entered must be 80 characters or fewer. Please adjust and try again.
The value entered must be 100 characters or fewer. Please adjust and try again.

fields.name: ImageURL
fields.helpText: Add a link to an image that will be shown to guests for this preference.

fields.name: Error_Preference_Code_Eligibility_creation_message
fields.fieldText:
Guest Preference Code '{!newRecord.Name}' created successfully!


Preference Code Eligibility record creation failed:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Code_not_unique_error
fields.fieldText:
The Code must be unique across all Guest Preference Codes.

Please enter a different value.

validationRule.errorMessage: The value entered must be 100 characters or fewer. Please adjust and try again.

fields.name: Sequence_not_unique_error
fields.fieldText:
The Sequence Number must be unique within the same Preference Section.

Please enter a different value.

fields.name: Success_message
fields.fieldText: Guest Preference Code '{!newRecord.Name}' created successfully
